componentDescription: ChatInput is a message composition input for chat and messaging interfaces. It includes a send button, supports attachment slots, and handles multi-line message entry. Use it for chat UIs, AI assistant interfaces, and comment boxes that need more affordance than a plain TextArea.
features: Send button (enabled when input has content)
Optional attachment slot for file/image upload buttons
Submit on Enter (with Shift+Enter for new line)

usageExamples.title: Basic chat message input
usageExamples.description: Simple chat input that sends on button click or Enter.
usageExamples.code:
<ChatInput
  value={message}
  onSend={handleSendMessage}
  placeholder="Type a message..."
  disabled={isSending}
/>

usageExamples.title: AI assistant input with attachments
usageExamples.description: Chat input for an AI interface with file attachment option.
usageExamples.code:
<ChatInput
  value={prompt}
  onSend={handleSendPrompt}
  placeholder="Ask anything..."
  maxLength={4000}
  disabled={isGenerating}
  attachmentSlot={
    <Tooltip content="Attach file">
      <Button
        buttonType={ButtonType.SECONDARY}
        size={ButtonSize.SMALL}
        subType={ButtonSubType.ICON_ONLY}
        leadingIcon={<PaperclipIcon />}
        onClick={triggerFileUpload}
      />
    </Tooltip>
  }
/>

value.llmContext: Required. Controlled message content string. Manage with useState. After sending, reset this to empty string. The send button is disabled when value is empty or only whitespace.

onSend.llmContext: Required. Called with the current message string when the user clicks Send or presses Enter (without Shift). This fires only when the input has non-empty content. Reset value to empty string after calling your send handler.
onSend.propDescription: Required. Called with message string when user sends

placeholder.llmContext: Hint text shown when the input is empty. Use conversational prompts like 'Type a message...', 'Ask a question...', or 'Reply...' to set expectations for the type of input expected.
placeholder.propDescription: Placeholder text shown when input is empty

disabled.llmContext: Set to true while a message is being sent or an AI response is being generated. Prevents duplicate submissions. Show a loading indicator alongside the disabled input so users know their message is processing.

maxLength.llmContext: Maximum character limit for the message. Set based on your backend's limits (API token limits for AI, message size limits for chat). Shows a counter when the user approaches the limit.
maxLength.propDescription: Maximum character count for the message

attachmentSlot.llmContext: React node rendered inside the input area as an attachment affordance. Typically a paperclip icon button that triggers a file picker. Keep it compact — it sits inside the input chrome.
attachmentSlot.propDescription: React node for attachment controls within the input
